# FI0-9490 — Show “Not provided” for missing fields on Check your answers

## User Story
As an exporter

I want the service to be designed in a user-friendly way

So that I can clearly understand and navigate the details I need to provide

## Acceptance Criteria

### Scenario 1 — Freight bill number empty shown as “Not provided” on Check your answers page
Given I have navigated to page `/check-your-information` in my Catch Certificate journey

When the freight bill number has not been populated

Then the freight bill number field is shown and the value is “Not provided”

---

### Scenario 2 — Document names and document references empty shown as “Not provided” on Check your answers page
Given I have navigated to page `/check-your-information` in my Catch Certificate journey

When no documents have been added for a transport mode

Then the document name and document references fields are shown and the value is “Not provided”

---

### Scenario 3 — RFMO empty shown as “Not provided” on Check your answers page
Given I have navigated to page `/check-your-information` in my Catch Certificate journey

When the RFMO has not been populated

Then the RFMO field is shown and the value is “Not provided”

---

### Scenario 4 — EEZ empty shown as “Not provided” on Check your answers page
Given I have navigated to page `/check-your-information` in my Catch Certificate journey

When the EEZ has not been populated

Then the EEZ field is shown and the value is “Not provided”

---

### Scenario 5 — Exporter reference empty shown as “Not provided” on Check your answers page
Given I have navigated to page `/check-your-information` in my CC journey

When the 'Your reference (optional)' has not been populated

Then the Your reference field is shown and the value is “Not provided”

---

### Scenario 6 — Welsh translation
Given I have navigated to page `/check-your-information` in my CC Manual Landing user journey

When I have selected Welsh language

Then the text “Not provided” is translated into Welsh "Heb ei ddarparu”

And all of the field labels are translated into Welsh

### Scenario 7 — Tests

Add/ament integration tests to cover the above scenarios as and where applicable
